linting.notes: Prettier configured with import ordering options that require a plugin (not installed). TypeScript check will fail without running build first as it depends on Gatsby-generated types. Neither linter is enforced in CI.

testing.notes: No test framework or tests configured in this repository. This is a Gatsby static site with no automated tests.

ci.notes: Only the build check is gating on PRs. No linting or type checking enforced. Deploy workflows run on push to main (gatsby.yml deploys to GitHub Pages, deploy-site.yml deploys to gh-pages branch).

build.notes: Gatsby 5.8.1 static site generator. Build takes ~60-70 seconds and generates 1300+ pages from markdown/asciidoc content. Some asciidoc files have warnings/errors during build but build completes successfully.

conventions.import_style: Prettier configured for import order: components imports first, then local imports, with separation between groups
conventions.notes: React/TypeScript components in src/components/, pages in src/pages/, templates in src/templates/, content in src/content/. No testing conventions as no tests exist.

lint_commands.notes: FAILED - 30 files have formatting issues. Plugin warnings for importOrder options (plugin not installed).
FAILED - Cannot find namespace 'Queries' (generated by Gatsby during build). Must run build first for typecheck to pass.

container_recipe.notes: No tests to run. Build generates Gatsby types needed for TypeScript checking. Prettier check finds formatting issues but these don't block build.
